description_long: This is a compact, single-story urban house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The front facade features a gated entryway with metal fencing, a covered porch, and large windows that allow natural light into the main living area. The house includes a small outdoor patio area with potted plants and a tiled walkway leading to the entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light beige and gray tones, with some sections clad in darker panels for contrast. The interior layout is visible, showing separate rooms for living, sleeping, and bathing, as well as a kitchen area. The overall structure is constructed primarily from concrete and masonry, with metal and glass elements for windows, doors, and fencing.
description: A modern, single-story urban house with a flat roof, gated entry, large windows, and a small patio area. The exterior features light and dark panels, metal fencing, and a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entry, covered porch, large windows, and patio with potted plants.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying plain exterior walls, minimal window openings, and the back section of the house.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the solid wall, small window, and the extension of the patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible patio, metal fencing, and two large potted plants near the entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with metal fencing, covered porch, and a single main door flanked by large windows
